title: Rocketman Is Found
description: Luffy and the crew push toward the station as Robin’s forced departure and the storm make every minute matter.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Luffy, Franky, Nico Robin, Zoro, Sanji. Luffy and the crew push toward the station as Robin’s forced departure and the storm make every minute matter.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We had almost decided to pardon you...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Why have you repeated the crime?!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The government agency, CPS, sinking the Shihousen.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Tom broke out of the hand- cuffs!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Tom punched frankly for the first time!!!

summary: Luffy and the crew push toward the station as Robin’s forced departure and the storm make every minute matter.
